use_cases: Used as a standalone selection control in forms for boolean options like terms acceptance
Serves as a filtering mechanism in e-commerce or data-driven applications
Functions as a task completion indicator in productivity tools
Acts as a preference toggle in settings interfaces
Enables bulk selection in list-based interfaces like email or file managers
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with standard focus-visible and disabled states. The component features a clean minimalist design with a check icon from Lucide React and supports the native checkbox state pattern using data attributes. Suitable for any application requiring form input controls with proper accessibility support.
